settings:about.automaticUpdatesDescripti: Hermes checks for updates automatically in the background and lets you know when one is ready.
settings:about.status.behind_one: A new update is ready ({{count}} change included).
settings:about.status.behind_other: A new update is ready ({{count}} changes included).
settings:about.status.error: We couldn't reach the update server.
settings:about.status.prompt: Tap "Check now" to look for updates.
settings:about.status.unsupported: This build can't update itself from inside the app.
settings:appearance.colorModeDescription: Pick a fixed mode or let Hermes follow your system setting.
settings:appearance.description: These are desktop-only display preferences. Mode controls brightness; theme controls the accent palette and chat surface styling.
settings:appearance.language.description: Pick the language used across the desktop app. More languages are added by the community — see the contributor guide.
settings:appearance.language.title: Language
settings:appearance.themeDescription: Desktop palettes only. The selected mode is applied on top.
settings:appearance.title: Appearance
settings:appearance.toolCallDisplayDescr: Product hides raw tool payloads; Technical shows full input/output.
settings:appearance.toolView.productDesc: Human-friendly tool activity with concise summaries.
settings:appearance.toolView.technicalDe: Include raw tool args/results and low-level details.
settings:config.empty.description: Settings you tune from this page will show up here.
settings:config.empty.title: No settings yet
settings:config.noMatches.description: Try a different search term or choose another section.
settings:config.noMatches.title: No matching settings
settings:fieldDesc.agent.image_input_mod: Controls how image attachments are sent to the model.
settings:fieldDesc.agent.max_turns: Upper bound for tool-calling turns before Hermes stops a run.
settings:fieldDesc.approvals.mode: How Hermes handles commands that need explicit approval.
settings:fieldDesc.approvals.timeout: How long approval prompts wait before timing out.
settings:fieldDesc.checkpoints.enabled: Create rollback snapshots before file edits.
settings:fieldDesc.code_execution.mode: How strictly code execution is scoped to the current project.
settings:fieldDesc.compression.enabled: Summarize older context when conversations get large.
settings:fieldDesc.context.engine: Strategy for managing long conversations near the context limit.
settings:fieldDesc.display.personality: Default assistant style for new sessions.
settings:fieldDesc.display.show_reasonin: Show reasoning sections when the backend provides them.
settings:fieldDesc.fallback_providers: Backup provider:model entries to try if the default model fails.
settings:fieldDesc.file_read_max_chars: Maximum characters Hermes can read from one file request.
settings:fieldDesc.memory.memory_enabled: Save durable memories that can help future sessions.
settings:fieldDesc.memory.user_profile_e: Maintain a compact profile of user preferences.
settings:fieldDesc.model: Used for new chats unless you pick a different model in the composer.
settings:fieldDesc.model_context_length: Leave at 0 to use the selected model's detected context window.
settings:fieldDesc.security.redact_secre: Hide detected secrets from model-visible content when possible.
settings:fieldDesc.stt.elevenlabs.langua: Optional ISO-639-3 language code. Blank lets ElevenLabs auto-detect.
settings:fieldDesc.stt.enabled: Enable local or provider-backed speech transcription.
settings:fieldDesc.terminal.cwd: Default project folder for tool and terminal work.
settings:fieldDesc.terminal.env_passthro: Environment variables to pass into tool execution.
settings:fieldDesc.terminal.persistent_s: Keep shell state between commands when the backend supports it.
settings:fieldDesc.timezone: Used when Hermes needs local time context. Blank uses the system timezone.
settings:gateway.description: Hermes Desktop starts its own local gateway by default. Use a remote gateway when you want this app to control an already-running Hermes backend on another machine or behind a trusted proxy.
settings:gateway.envOverrideWarning.desc: Unset HERMES_DESKTOP_REMOTE_URL and HERMES_DESKTOP_REMOTE_TOKEN to use the saved setting below.
settings:gateway.envOverrideWarning.titl: Environment variables are controlling this desktop session.
settings:gateway.incomplete.connect: Enter a remote URL and session token before switching to remote.
settings:gateway.incomplete.test: Enter a remote URL and session token before testing.
settings:gateway.incomplete.title: Remote gateway incomplete
settings:gateway.localMode.description: Start a private Hermes backend on localhost. This is the default and works offline.
settings:gateway.localMode.title: Local gateway
settings:gateway.logsDescription: Reveal desktop.log in your file manager — useful when the gateway fails to start.
settings:gateway.remoteMode.description: Connect this desktop shell to a remote Hermes backend using its session token.
settings:gateway.remoteMode.title: Remote gateway
settings:gateway.remoteUrl.description: Base URL for the remote dashboard backend. Path prefixes are supported, for example /hermes.
settings:gateway.restarting.message: Hermes Desktop will reconnect using the saved settings.
settings:gateway.restarting.title: Gateway connection restarting
settings:gateway.saved.title: Gateway settings saved
settings:gateway.sessionToken.descriptio: The dashboard session token used for REST and WebSocket access. Leave blank to keep the saved token.
settings:gateway.testSuccess.title: Remote gateway reachable
settings:gateway.title: Gateway Connection
settings:gateway.unavailable.description: The desktop IPC bridge does not expose gateway settings.
settings:gateway.unavailable.title: Gateway settings unavailable
settings:keys.removed.title: Credential removed
settings:keys.saved.title: Credential saved
settings:mcp.empty.description: Add a stdio or HTTP server to expose MCP tools.
settings:mcp.empty.title: No MCP servers
settings:mcp.gatewayUnavailable.message: Reconnect the gateway before reloading MCP.
settings:mcp.gatewayUnavailable.title: Gateway unavailable
settings:mcp.name: Name
settings:mcp.nameRequired.message: Give this MCP server a config key.
settings:mcp.nameRequired.title: Name required
settings:mcp.reloaded.message: New tool schemas apply to fresh turns.
settings:mcp.reloaded.title: MCP tools reloaded
settings:mcp.saved.title: MCP server saved
settings:mcp.title: MCP servers
settings:resetConfirm: Reset all settings to Hermes defaults?
settings:sessions.deleteConfirm: Permanently delete "{{title}}"? This cannot be undone.
settings:sessions.description: Archived chats are hidden from the sidebar but keep all their messages. Ctrl/⌘-click a chat in the sidebar to archive it.
settings:sessions.empty.idle: Archive a chat to hide it here.
settings:sessions.empty.search: No archived chats match your search.
settings:sessions.empty.title: Nothing archived
settings:sessions.title: Archived sessions
settings:toolset.empty.noAvailable: No providers are available for this toolset right now.
settings:toolset.empty.noProviders: This toolset has no provider options — enable it and it works with your current setup.
settings:toolset.nousAuth: Included with a Nous subscription — sign in to Nous Portal to activate.
settings:toolset.postSetup: This provider needs an extra setup step ({{step}}). Run it from the CLI with `hermes tools` for now.
settings:toolset.providerSelected.title: Provider selected
